name: Bluefish Sushi or Sashimi
recipeIngredient: 2 pieces of bluefish (60 cm x 2.5 cm x 7.5 cm)
soy sauce (regular or ginger, leave 3 or 4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add a couple of pieces of chopped scallions to the sliced bluefish.
2. Serve with regular soy sauce or your favorite ginger-soy sauce.
Difficulty: Easy
Precision: No need to measure.
